title: Salmonella: how to reduce the risk from animal feed
body: "This code of practice explains how to control the spread of Salmonella in animal feed during the production, storage and transport of compound feeds, premixtures, feed materials and feed additives for food producing animals and equines.  You can provide feedback on this code of practice by contacting us at: feedcodeofpractice@apha.gov.uk. "
